title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE DANIEL Z. ROMUALDEZ MEMORIAL SCHOOL OF FISHERIES IN TOLOSA, LEYTE, TO LEYTE STATE SCHOOL OF FISHERIES

chunks.text:
H. No. 29297 / 87 OG No. 44, 6615 (Nov. 4, 1991)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7105, August 14, 1991 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE DANIEL Z. ROMUALDEZ MEMORIAL SCHOOL OF FISHERIES IN TOLOSA, LEYTE, TO LEYTE STATE SCHOOL OF FISHERIES

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Daniel Z. Romualdez Memorial School of Fisheries in Tolosa, Leyte, is hereby changed to Leyte State School of Fisheries.

SEC. 2. The College shall offer secondary course in fisheries, short-term technical or vocational courses, and higher technological and professional instruction and training in fisheries as may be authorized by the Department of Education, Culture and Sports.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

JOVITO R. SALONGA

RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on May 22, 1991 and May 16, 1991, respectively.

EDWIN P. ACOBA

CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: August 14, 1991

CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
